response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in AI-driven solutions, cloud platforms, and vector databases. They have worked on various projects that involve AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
Proficient in multiple programming languages including TypeScript and Python
Strong background in cloud platforms and Docker
concerns: No direct experience with retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) architectures
Limited experience with multi-agent system frameworks
